title: The Reign of Greed
author: Rizal, José
summary: El Filibusterismo (The Reign of Greed) continues Noli Me Tangere’s tale of Spanish colonial Philippines. Juan Crisóstomo Ibarra returns from Europe to find his father dead and confronts clerical and governmental corruption. Betrayal, forged documents, and plots force Ibarra into exile; Maria Clara is coerced into a convent. Elias aids fugitives but dies; young Basilio suffers poverty and loss. Amid satire and social critique, Rizal depicts friars, local elites, and bureaucrats presiding over injustice, hypocrisy, and repression. The narrative follows diverse Manila types, pasquinades, conspiracies, and a simmering revolutionary mood that presages violent consequence and national awakening and resistance movements.
